# `<YYYY-MM-DD>` — Daily Narrative

*Auto-generated by sprint-scribe cron every ~30 min. Appended to `sprint-log/events/YYYY-MM-DD.md`. Rewritten in place on each refresh.*

## Today in one paragraph

<!--
  SCRIBE INSTRUCTIONS:
  - One plain-English paragraph (3-6 sentences). NOT a list.
  - What moved today and why it matters for the product.
  - Any jargon must link to a glossary entry in STATE-OF-SPRINT.md §Glossary.
  - Refresh in place every 30 min; don't append a new paragraph each run.
  - Prefer concrete verbs and numbers: "B2 merged at 03:21 CEST", "6 Mike-gates resolved by Hermes-ops", "1 canary FAIL on A6".
  - Opening line pattern: "<Date (weekday)> moved the sprint forward on <top-1 theme>. <what shipped>. <what's open>."
  - Closing line: one sentence on what the next 12-24h looks like.
  - Target 80-140 words.
-->

_No narrative yet today. Scribe refreshes this section every ~30 minutes._

## Key moments

<!--
  SCRIBE INSTRUCTIONS:
  - Bullets, reverse-chron, `HH:MM UTC` — plain-English one-liner.
  - Include ONLY: MERGED, CANARY_PASS, CANARY_FAIL, DECISION_RESOLVED, BLOCKED, BLOCKER_RESOLVED, explicit Mike directives, plan publications for CRITICAL tier only.
  - SKIP: AGENT_HEARTBEAT, duplicate merge events (same task_id within 5min), low-value sprint notes, FORGE plans for STANDARD/LIGHTWEIGHT tier (those live in Running ticker).
  - Cap at ~12 bullets; if more, keep the 12 highest-signal and drop the rest.
  - Each bullet max 110 chars. No event IDs in this section — they belong in Running ticker.
-->

- <HH:MM UTC> — <one-line plain-English event>

## Running ticker (events)

<!--
  SCRIBE INSTRUCTIONS:
  - Full trace for later "ELI-IQ-100" queries. Reverse chronological.
  - One line per event: `HH:MM UTC — <emoji> <EVENT_TYPE> <task_id> · <agent> — <summary>  [<event_id>]`
  - Every line MUST end with the event_id in square brackets — this is the only stable citation key.
  - Include ALL events from events.jsonl for this date, including the ones skipped in Key moments.
  - Long summaries: truncate to 140 chars with a trailing `…`; full text lives in the event log.
  - If an event references an artifact path, append ` → <artifact>` after the summary (before event_id).
  - Grouping: NONE. Keep it flat reverse-chron so ctrl-F on a task_id or event_type Just Works.
-->

- <HH:MM UTC> — <emoji> <EVENT_TYPE> <task_id> · <agent> — <summary> [<event_id>]
